metadata.districtModel: five sections; five district slots per section; D13 is the seat of power

cityDNA.coreFantasy: A cervine antlered beastfolk city where Antlered Root-Hearth of the White Stag, Sacred Grove Beacon, Antler Arches Sovereign Registry Court, and the five-section district spine turn local identity into functional civic space.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Elarion Thicket should feel immediately identifiable through exact landmarks and materials, not through generic fantasy-city shorthand.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Elarion Thicket organizes power through Antler Arches Sovereign Registry Court, public response through Sacred Grove Beacon, civic memory through Antlered Root-Hearth of the White Stag, and daily life through S1 Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, S2 Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, S3 Public Works Authority Hall, S4 Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, S5 High Residential Civic Hall.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Oak, Limestone Blocks, Timber, Arcane Glow, Antler, Forest, Root Network, Old Growth Woodland, Beast Bonding, Ancestor Guidance, Living Roots, and exact anchors including Antler Arches Sovereign Registry Court, Sacred Grove Beacon, Antlered Root-Hearth of the White Stag, Manor Court, Temple Platform, Guildhall, Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Hanging Gardens Monument, Living Canopy Hall Nook, Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: A cervine antlered beastfolk civic culture where architecture, public obligations, roads, landmark approaches, and everyday work must all read as part of the same civilization.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: The city symbol system is built from exact names and visible functions: Antlered Root-Hearth of the White Stag, Sacred Grove Beacon, Antler Arches Sovereign Registry Court, and section anchors such as Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, Public Works Authority Hall, Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, High Residential Civic Hall.

canonLocks: Elarion Thicket uses city code ETT.
The Wonder is Antlered Root-Hearth of the White Stag.
The Beacon is Sacred Grove Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Antler Arches Sovereign Registry Court and occupies District 13.
The city uses five sections with five tactical district slots per section.

The source-backed section spine is: S1 Nature Preserve / Sacred Grove Civic Hall, S2 Religious / Temple Quarter Civic Hall, S3 Public Works Authority Hall, S4 Artisan Guilds Civic Hall, S5 High Residential Civic Hall.

rejectedReads: Do not treat Elarion Thicket as a generic fantasy settlement with renamed landmarks.
Do not collapse the five-section board into a single mood or single district.
Do not replace exact anchor names with generic summaries.
Do not invent missing street-section landmarks when a street source is absent.
cautionFlags: Keep every named Wonder, Beacon, Seat, section civic hall, major landmark, monument, and minor nook exact when present in sidecars.
If an image appears to deviate from a sidecar, preserve the exact name but avoid overclaiming visual details not supported by the source package.
Every district asset should remain usable for narrative scenes, tactical board dioramas, and city map backgrounds.
